dimensions.name: artifact_existence
dimensions.evidence: All files present: schemas/merge-policy.yaml + schemas/merge-policy.schema.json (draft-07, additionalProperties:false, strategy enum); commands/merge.md (five-phase body with --dry-run/--skip-verify/--policy/--resume); bin/frw.d/scripts/merge-{audit,classify,resolve-plan,execute,verify,sort-union}.sh; bin/frw.d/hooks/script-guard.sh upgraded with POSIX awk shell_strip_data_regions() heredoc-tokenizer; bin/frw dispatcher cases for merge-*; skills/shared/merge-protocol.md; 8 new tests incl. test-merge-e2e.sh.

dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
dimensions.evidence: AC-1 (/furrow:merge five-phase + --resume): commands/merge.md grep finds all 5 phases + 4 flags. AC-2 (audit phase): merge-audit detects symlink typechanges, install-artifacts, overlap commits, stale references, common.sh syntax — test-merge-audit 11/11. AC-3 (classify labels): {safe,redundant-with-main,destructive,mixed} assigned per commit, exit 4 on destructive — test-merge-classify 11/11. AC-4 (policy schema): test-merge-policy-schema 19/19 with additionalProperties:false. AC-5 (resolve-plan + inputs_hash + approved:yes): test-merge-resolve-plan 15/15 incl. rerun-resets-approval. AC-6 (execute + deviation + exit 8): test-merge-execute 5/5 covers inputs_hash mismatch (exit 5), unplanned conflict (exit 6), common.sh break (exit 8). AC-7 (verify reuses wave-1 primitives): test-merge-verify 10/10 incl. grep assertions for rws validate-sort-invariant + rescue.sh --baseline-check. AC-8 (script-guard heredoc): test-script-guard-heredoc 15/15 — positive block (real invocation) + negative allow (heredoc body). AC-9 (no prose parsing): grep -c 'summary\.md' returns 0 across all merge-*.sh; merge-audit calls rws get-reintegration-json and embeds JSON. AC-10 (end-to-end): test-merge-e2e 30/30 drives contaminated fixture through all 5 phases.

dimensions.name: file_ownership_conformance
dimensions.evidence: All 18 new/modified files within wave-3 ownership. Confirmed NOT modified (wave-1/wave-2 surfaces): install.sh, bin/frw.d/install.sh, common.sh, common-minimal.sh, rescue.sh, upgrade.sh, launch-phase.sh, generate-reintegration.sh, all other hooks, schemas/reintegration.schema.json, templates/*, wave-1/wave-2 tests. bin/frw modifications limited to added merge dispatcher cases. bin/frw.d/hooks/script-guard.sh modified per 3h scope; diff limited to shell_strip_data_regions() insertion.

dimensions.name: test_execution
dimensions.evidence: test-merge-policy-schema 19/19, test-script-guard-heredoc 15/15, test-merge-audit 11/11, test-merge-classify 11/11, test-merge-resolve-plan 15/15, test-merge-execute 5/5, test-merge-verify 10/10, test-merge-e2e 30/30. Total 116 new assertions. Regression smoke: test-rescue 13/13, test-hook-cascade 22/22, test-reintegration 40/40, test-sort-seeds + test-sort-todos 18/18.

dimensions.name: primitive_reuse_verification
dimensions.evidence: merge-audit.sh lines 213-220 call rws get-reintegration-json and embed verbatim as audit.json.reintegration_json (AC-9). merge-verify.sh check 4 calls rws validate-sort-invariant; check 6 calls rescue.sh --baseline-check. No copy-pasted logic; wave-1/wave-2 CLIs are reused as black boxes — the design intent of the multi-wave structure.
